2604.08400.title: Zero-shot Multivariate Time Series Forecasting Using Tabular Prior Fitted Networks
2604.08400.paper_summary: Tabular foundation models, particularly Prior-data Fitted Networks like TabPFN have emerged as the leading contender in a myriad of tasks ranging from data imputation to label prediction on the tabular data format surpassing the historical successes of tree-based models. This has led to investigations on their applicability to forecasting time series data which can be formulated as a tabular problem. While recent work to this end has displayed positive results, most works have limited their treatment of multivariate time series problems to several independent univariate time series forecasting subproblems, thus ignoring any inter-channel interactions. Overcoming this limitation, we introduce a generally applicable framework for multivariate time series forecasting using tabular foundation models. We achieve this by recasting the multivariate time series forecasting problem as a series of scalar regression problems which can then be solved zero-shot by any tabular foundation model with regression capabilities. We present results of our method using the TabPFN-TS backbone and compare performance with the current state of the art tabular methods.
2604.08400.paper_summary_zh: 表格基礎模型，特別是像 TabPFN 這樣的先前數據擬合網絡，已成為在各種任務中（從數據插補到標籤預測）表格數據格式的主要競爭者，超越了基於樹的模型的歷史成功。這導致了對它們在預測時間序列數據中的適用性的研究，這可以被表述為一個表格問題。雖然最近的工作顯示出積極的結果，但大多數工作將對多變量時間序列問題的處理限制為幾個獨立的單變量時間序列預測子問題，因此忽略了任何通道間的互動。為了克服這一限制，我們引入了一個通用的多變量時間序列預測框架，使用表格基礎模型。我們通過將多變量時間序列預測問題重新表述為一系列標量回歸問題來實現這一點，然後可以通過任何具有回歸能力的表格基礎模型進行零樣本解決。我們展示了使用 TabPFN-TS 主幹的我們方法的結果，並將性能與當前最先進的表格方法進行比較。
2604.08400.author: Mayuka Jayawardhana et.al.
2604.08400.authors: Mayuka Jayawardhana, Nihal Sharma, Kazem Meidani, Bayan Bruss, Tom Goldstein, Doron Bergman
